best way to put it is that the visual design of the aram (particularly their outfit designs) uses a lot of design tropes that are like. just mishmashing a bunch of different middle-eastern adjacent cultures into one to make something 'exotic'
like the aramites have ancient egyptian fashion for some reason
and are all shirtless
which isn't a crime in and of itself but it's historically a very common lazy way of depicting middle-eastern-adjacent cultures
As we all know, in real life being shirtless in the desert is awesome and totally not one of the worst things one can do.

Aqueor-
Belong or have some kind of connection to sea

Caro-
Associates with body part, specialize in matters to flesh and blood

Ultra-
Associates with space and dimensions 

When they didn't belong to any of this they end up in Chaos
